name: Dill Sauce with Scallops Over Angel Hair Pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, melt the butter and sauté shallots until translucent.
2. Stir in flour and cook for 5 minutes to form a roux, stirring frequently.
3. Gradually add cream and half and half, cooking until simmering.
4. Whisk into the roux, cooking for 5-10 minutes until thickened to desired consistency.
5. Stir in Tabasco sauce, dill, salt, and white pepper; keep warm.
6. Sauté scallops in a skillet with butter until browned.
7. Add wine to the sauce and combine with the cream mixture.
8. Serve over cooked angel hair pasta.
